header.title: Eco Calculator
header.subtitle: Estimate your trip's carbon footprint & offset naturally

comparisons.excellent: 🌱 Excellent! Lower than average safari footprint.
comparisons.good: 👍 Good! Within average range for Tanzania safaris.
comparisons.consider: 💡 Consider offsetting this trip with our tree planting program.

ecoTips.budget: Budget safaris use shared vehicles and camping — lower footprint!
ecoTips.mid: Mid-range lodges often have solar power and water conservation.
ecoTips.luxury: Luxury lodges offset carbon, but private transport increases footprint.
ecoTips.flight: Consider combining flights with road transfers to reduce emissions.
ecoTips.drive: Safari vehicles are efficient — you're already making a good choice!
ecoTips.mixed: Smart combination! Mixing transport types balances convenience and footprint.

placeholder.text: Fill out the form and click calculate to see your trip's carbon footprint

tree.title: Tree Planting
tree.description: We plant 5 trees for every safari booked through our reforestation partners.

carbon.title: Carbon Offset
carbon.description: Optional carbon offset program available for all our travel packages.

water.title: Clean Water
water.description: Supporting clean water projects in communities near national parks.

footer.note: * Calculations based on UNFCCC and sustainable travel guidelines. Actual footprint may vary.
